metadata.description: Node.js edition of the Every plugin marketplace for Claude Code extensions

plugins.name: js-compound-engineering
plugins.description: AI-powered development tools that get smarter with every use. Make each unit of engineering work easier than the last. Includes 49 agents, 41 skills, 1 MCP server.

plugins.name: js-coding-tutor
plugins.description: Personalized coding tutorials that use your actual codebase for examples with spaced repetition quizzes

plugins.name: compound-c4-architecture
plugins.description: C4 architecture documentation tools. 4 agents and 1 command for generating comprehensive C4 model diagrams (Context, Container, Component, Code).
